message:
fix(fp-frame): reject empty separator in str.split_expand

str.split_expand("") previously relied on Rust's str::split("") yielding
per-character partitions, which silently diverges from pandas, where
split("", expand=True) raises ValueError. Return a
CompatibilityRejected error with the 'empty separator' message so
strict-mode callers fail closed consistent with the pandas oracle.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
